category_sources: Official README says Ott generates LaTeX, Coq, HOL, Isabelle/HOL, Lem, OCaml, and parser artifacts from language definitions.
source_facts.description says it writes definitions of programming languages and calculi.
display_name_sources: Official README uses the project heading Ott.
docs_sources: Official README links the manual in built_doc and the Cambridge HTML manual.
source_facts.homepage points to the official Cambridge Ott page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/ott-lang/ott; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README describes programming-language definitions and outputs for LaTeX, Coq, HOL, Isabelle/HOL, Lem, and OCaml.
source_facts.description identifies programming languages and calculi.
